description_long: This object consists of three tall, cylindrical aluminum cans grouped together, each with a matte black exterior. The front of the cans features a striking graphic of a roaring beast's head in gray and white, with bold yellow and metallic silver text beneath it. The phrase 'Unleash the Beast' is prominently displayed in yellow, while the word 'ENERGY' is rendered in a metallic style. The back of the cans displays detailed nutrition facts, ingredients, and a barcode in white and yellow text. The tops of the cans are standard pull-tab style, and the volume marking '473ml' is visible near the base. The overall design is aggressive and modern, with a dark, high-contrast color scheme and sharp, angular typography.
description: A trio of tall, matte black aluminum cans with a fierce beast graphic, bold metallic and yellow text, and detailed nutritional information on the back. The design is aggressive and modern, emphasizing energy and power.
description_view_0: Three matte black cans are shown with the side and partial front visible, highlighting the beast graphic and some yellow text, with the '473ml' marking at the base.
description_view_1: The rear of the cans is visible, displaying nutrition facts, ingredients, and a barcode in white and yellow text.
description_view_2: The front and side of the cans are visible, showcasing the beast graphic, bold text, and the phrase 'Unleash the Beast' in yellow.
description_view_3: A direct front view of the cans, clearly showing the beast graphic, metallic and yellow text, and the overall aggressive design.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a fierce beast head illustration in gray and white, with bold, angular metallic and yellow typography. The design is high-contrast and modern, with a dark background and aggressive visual style.
